author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B (#985) value-parity attempt failed at the strict loader's UnmappedFixtureKey check.

Verbatim panic: 'DenseNet121: loader failed on well-formed fixture: invalid argument: DenseNet121 value-parity loader: torchvision key "features.denseblock3.denselayer12.conv2.weight" has no mapping to a ferrotorch parameter and is not a declared BN buffer'

Root cause: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/densenet.rs documents the impl as 'simplified' — explicitly omitting the BN layers. The DenseNet121 in ferrotorch only has Conv2d weights (bn_conv, body_conv); torchvision's densenet121 has features.norm0/1/2, features.denseblockN.denselayerM.norm1/2, features.transitionN.norm — none of which exist in ferrotorch.

Phase 1B (#985) is test-infra only (no src/ changes per coordination boundaries). Marked ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs::value_parity_pipeline::densenet121_* tests with #[ignore = "#989 ..."]; fixture in fixtures_value_parity.json kept so dropping the ignore is a one-line change once this issue lands.
